name: Sunny Slope Golf Course
address: 4285 S Sunny Slope Rd, New Berlin, WI 53151
about: Sunny Slope Golf Course is a 9-hole course located in a quiet, secluded corner of New Berlin, WI. The venue offers both outdoor golf on its course and indoor simulation capabilities using Trackman technology. It provides a full bar and bar food service, making it a multi-faceted destination for golfers and social gatherings. The facility also hosts leagues, banquets, clubhouse rentals, and a pro shop, catering to a variety of golf and social needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for accurate simulation
Full bar and food service available on-site
Secluded and quiet setting for focused play
Hosts leagues and events for regular play
Offers both outdoor and indoor golf options

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor Trackman simulator available for booking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and serves bar food, but the policy on outside food and drinks is not specified.

faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the typical duration for 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding kid-friendly amenities or policies on the website.
